decision: Reassessment implemented: museum is limited to proof beats; Shot 3 is being reworked away from same-room museum staging.

generated_after_reassessment.result: Did not pass. It became more visually distinct, but drifted into outdoor forest/leaf backgrounds in several variants and failed exact one apple/one squirrel/one nut clarity. v01 had cleaner no-forest look but missed clear nut and had two squirrels. v03/v06 had better object separation but extra/incorrect objects.

Better control: no forest/grass and not an outdoor museum scene. Still not final: model keeps replacing the red apple or walnut with pumpkins/blue objects/leaves/extra props. v06 is the closest direction because it has a red apple and one squirrel, but the nut is not unmistakable enough and there are extra disk props.

current_hold_status.shot_01: Keep v15 as immersive style/quality hold.
current_hold_status.shot_02: Keep v16/v17 as valid fossil proof/museum beat.
current_hold_status.shot_03: No final hold yet. v20 is fallback/reference only; v22 is better direction/control reference only.

next_step: For Shot 3, stop asking one text-to-image prompt to solve all objects. Build a more controlled plate or generate/compose the apple, squirrel, and walnut as separate elements, then polish as one image with img2img/control.
